description: An HTML file serving as the frontend interface for a database visualizer application. It contains UI elements, styles, and JavaScript code to load and display database information and table data dynamically.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of available databases and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases, resets current selection, and updates UI.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses the database to show its tables, and loads tables when expanded.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and renders data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Generates HTML for displaying data in tabular form.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Creates HTML for individual table cell values, handling objects, nulls, and long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for detailed viewing.
